bundle_scope: Python-generated Talagrand/Hamming/Golay proof artifacts, scripts, certificates, reports, and CSV/JSON data created in this session.

claim_boundary.handoff_note: Several artifacts are numerical audits or formal reductions, not proofs. Machine certificates include claim_boundary fields where applicable.
claim_boundary.remaining_open_target: Exclude the multilevel KKT obstruction system with dF>0, equivalently prove the weighted-asymmetry contact lemma exactly.

main_chain: Hamming/Golay finite shell audits and Gaussian/Talagrand bridge
